title: Court is in Session
editorialSummary: Areas of law grouped by subject matter. False trail: tort and contract are both civil law, but the groups split civil law from criminal law; constitutional law and administrative law both involve government but belong to different groups. Players must know the exact branch, not just public vs private.

meta.gptRationale: The categories are familiar legal domains and most terms are standard textbook examples, so the structure is clearer than average for the tier.
